package com.example;

final enum Season {
    public static final Season SPRING = new Season("SPRING", 0, "warm");
    public static final Season SUMMER = new Season("SUMMER", 1, "hot");
    public static final Season AUTUMN = new Season("AUTUMN", 2, "cool");
    public static final Season WINTER = new Season("WINTER", 3, "cold");
    private final String feeling;
    private static final Season[] $VALUES;

    public static Season[] values() {
        return (([LSeason;) Season.$VALUES.clone());
    }
    public static Season valueOf(String p0) {
        return ((Season) Enum.valueOf(Season.class, p0));
    }
    private Season(String p0) {
        this.feeling = p2;
    }
    public String feeling() {
        return this.feeling;
    }
    private static Season[] $values() {
        return new Season[]{ Season.SPRING, Season.SUMMER, Season.AUTUMN, Season.WINTER };
    }
    static {
        Season.$VALUES = Season.$values();
    }
}
